title: “A Perfect Couple’s Escape & New Year’s Highlight!”
reviewText: We booked a Suite Room with a Pool View, and it was the best decision we made. Being on the balcony and having a front-row seat to the New Year’s Eve fireworks was magical. We could see the entire display over the Grand World area without leaving our room—it felt incredibly private and romantic. The room was spacious, clean, and modern. Having that extra space in the Suite made a huge difference compared to the standard rooms. Looking out over the massive pool every morning was a great way to start the day. The breakfast spread was impressive! There was a huge selection of both Vietnamese and International dishes. Whether you want a traditional Phở or a classic Western breakfast with pastries and eggs, they had it all. It can get busy, but the variety makes it worth it. The transport system here is a game-changer for couples who don't want to deal with the hassle of taxis: VinBus to Attractions: There is a free shuttle that takes you directly to VinWonders and Vinpearl Safari almost every hour. City & Airport Transfers: We were so impressed by the free bus service to the city center (Duong Dong) and the airport. It’s professional, air-conditioned, and saved us a lot of money on transport. The staff were incredibly friendly and welcoming. From the quick check-in to helping us with bus schedules, they always had a smile on their faces and made us feel right at home. For couples who want a mix of excitement (Grand World is right next door) and comfort, this is a 10/10. Definitely try to get a pool-view room if you can!

reviewerName: Wing from Hong Kong SAR, China
title: “good value hotel in granworld”
reviewText: very good location at the edge of grandworld where you can walk to everything and yet remain quiet. good pool with shading most of the time. good breakfast. good facilities in the room. It is not luxury or resort type of hotel. but everything is great for this price point.

title: “Our experience at Fivitel Da Nang was nothing short of amazing! From the moment we arrived, the staff greeted us with warm smiles and outstanding hospitality. The check-in was smooth, and every staff ”
reviewText: Our experience at Fivitel Da Nang was nothing short of amazing! From the moment we arrived, the staff greeted us with warm smiles and outstanding hospitality. The check-in was smooth, and every staff member went above and beyond to make our stay comfortable. The room was spacious, spotless, and beautifully designed, offering a stunning view of the Han River and Dragon Bridge — especially breathtaking at night. The bed was super comfortable, and all amenities were well-maintained. The breakfast buffet was excellent, with a wide variety of delicious local and international dishes. We also loved the rooftop pool and bar, where you can relax while enjoying panoramic views of the city. The hotel’s location is perfect — close to the beach, markets, and major attractions, yet peaceful and relaxing. Overall, Fivitel truly deserves its exceptional rating. It’s a perfect blend of luxury, comfort, and Vietnamese warmth. Highly recommended for both families and couples! ⭐ Rating: 10/10 — Would love to stay again!

title: “Great pool, good location”
reviewText: Overall is spacious, with a variety of food for breakfast. Good thing they have free shuttle bus to the safari & Vinwonders. Just that the bathroom doesn't have conditioner. The shampoo will make the hair very dry.

title: “Vinholidays Fiesta Phu Quoc ”
reviewText: I am very pleased with Vinholidays Fiesta Phu Quoc. We got the package that booking 2 nights with the hotel we each got tickets to go to Vinwonders theme park. We booked for 5 nights we got 2 more tickets to go to Vinwonders or Safari. We choose Vinwonders so we went there to Vinwonders twice. We booked the room with the pool views and we were on the fifth floor several rooms to center looking down at the pool. The room was spotless and no smells. The only downside are not enough cabinets for guests luggages and usb for phone and laptops charging. The electrical outlets are very hard to plugging our gadgets! Also, wifi is very slow. Breakfast buffet is ok. My only complaining about is the cafe sua da remixed for Vietnamese guests wasn't good. I preferred black coffee then mixed with condensed milk tasted better. Indian guests have warned milk, Russian guests have fresh milk. Why isn't any condensed milk on the counter at the breakfast. Every morning I have to asked the staffs for condensed milk every morning! I have to waited for my milk. Would that easier to have a small bowl of condensed milk for Vietnamese guests? We have been traveling on our vaxation North to South for almost 5 months in Vietnam and stay in many hotels. Only The aquarium is the fifth biggest in the world. The mermaids show starts at 2 pm, 2:30, 3 and 3:30. Peoples already waiting 1 hrs before the show to have good views of the show. The fantasy Once show at Vinhwonders with lazer lights, watermelon dance, music, fire and performers at 6:30 was an awesome show! Make sure you are at the fountain and saving your seats at least 1 hr ahead.

title: “Hidden Jewel”
reviewText: Excellent location with access to Marts, shops and main market within 30 seconds walking. Good options in Breakfast. Excellent swimming pool. Big kids play room with well trained staff to take care of kids. They have well connected bus service with pickup/ drop at Hotel Main Entrance. Bus shuttles to VinWonders and Safari also. Staff are friendly and helpful. For family with kids they offer interconnected rooms, which is convenient and offers space for kids to run around. Over all excellent for family stay.

title: “Family trip with parents”
reviewText: I went on a family trip with my parents in their 40s and stayed for 2 nights. It's very convenient to walk around Grand World, so it's great for eating and exchanging money. However, during check-in and check-out, it feels very crowded and chaotic. Even though we went during the low season in the second week of March, there were no available seats for breakfast, and they couldn't clear the tables quickly, so it would be better to go early or late. The location to Vin Wonders, Safari, and Grand World is almost unbeatable, so it seems like a good trip if you're with parents or kids! The room was generally quiet and clean, but there was really nothing in it... besides toilet paper in the bathroom, there weren't any napkins or trash bins. It was tidy! The lobby was quite bustling, but they brought things to us quickly when we requested, which was nice.

title: “5 Stars Exceptional Service ”
reviewText: Modern, Chic, Luxurious, best breakfast buffet in all of Vietnam. Service is Exceptional- grounds exquisite- comfy bed- A/C Strong and Good- no mold smell, amazing stay!

title: “Great Location and Perks Despite a Small Room Issue”
reviewText: We had a pleasant stay at VinHoliday Fiesta. Our room was located on the 8th floor and included connecting rooms, which made access to our kids very easy and convenient. There was a minor setback upon arrival when the bathroom door handle was broken and briefly locked me inside. Fortunately, it could be opened from the outside, and after calling the front desk, maintenance arrived and fixed the issue in under an hour. We appreciated the quick response and resolution. Our stay included free breakfast, which was tasty, as well as complimentary tickets to either VinWonders or VinSafari—we chose VinWonders and really enjoyed it. The hotel is within walking distance to Grand World, which was very convenient. The pool looked relaxing, but unfortunately our short stay didn’t allow us time to enjoy the amenities. Transportation was easy as well; we took a Grab to VinWonders and a tuk-tuk back to the hotel. Overall, it was a comfortable stay with family-friendly features and great added perks.

title: “Romantic trip”
reviewText: The overall experience of staying at VinHolidays Fiesta Hotel was very pleasant. The room was clean and tidy, and the environment was comfortable, making it very relaxing to stay. The hotel's location is also ideal, close to VinWonders and the Venice River area, with most attractions and restaurants within walking distance, making travel very convenient. In addition, the hotel also offers shuttle bus services, making it easy to get to the zoo and VinWonders theme park, which is very friendly for tourists, saving both time and effort. Overall, whether it's the location, transportation, or accommodation experience, I was very satisfied; it is a great choice for traveling to Phu Quoc Island. 👍

title: “Amazing stay ”
reviewText: Place is modern, very clean and smells amazing. Close to everything, staff is friendly and helpful, spacious rooms. You are right by bin wonders which is a very cool theme park and also by the safari park. There's a free shuttle that takes you and also takes you to the airport for free. Would stay again anytime

title: “It's really great!”
reviewText: Breakfast: Delicious, very large Pool: Open from 06:00 to 19:30, so it’s a bit disappointing that there's no night swimming, but the pool is very large Convenience: There is a bus to Vinpearl Safari. It goes to other places as well, but I only went to the safari, so I'm not sure about the other destinations You can store your luggage before check-in The room is cool. I don't know if it's because I booked a large room, but it's spacious and nice There is a gym, but it's small. There were a treadmill, a bicycle, and one machine.

title: “Excellent property with amazing location benefit ”
reviewText: Stayed in 2 rooms with 5 people Location: the best, right next to Grand Palace and only 10 mins away from Vinwonder amusement park Rooms: very spacious and comfortable Service: exceptional, housekeeping done daily and efficiently Food: good options Pool: Large and well maintained Staff: very helpful and courteous Recommend this place to anyone travelling with kids or otherwise because it’s location is beyond expectations

title: “Recommended”
reviewText: The hotel location is very convenient, with many small shops just a short walk away. One great advantage is that you can purchase tickets for the Safari and VinWonders theme park directly from the hotel, which makes everything much easier. The hotel is also very spacious and clean, making the stay comfortable and enjoyable.

title: “Exceptional Stay with Great Amenities”
reviewText: The property offers excellent value with spotless cleanliness and friendly staff that enhance the experience. Its location is perfect for easy exploration, complemented by reliable Wi-Fi and efficient housekeeping. Facilities are well-maintained, including consistent hot water, making the overall stay comfortable and convenient.

title: “Vinholidays fiesta phu quoc ”
reviewText: Vinholidays Fiesta Phu Quoc Vietnam is very clean. We love the vinh shuttle bus to the beach and back. Also, the V1 bus will bring you to Vinwonders and Safari. Take the V1 to parking T2 then waiting for T17 to the night market in center of the town or to Phu Quoc airport. When arrival after luggages done go out of the airport turn left the far left of the parking lot you'll see the T17 bus to go to Vinholidays Fiesta hotel. They'll drop you off outside the designated point and you'll see the sign across the road Vinholidays Fiesta. Go through the little opening near the sign walk through the pool areas to the lobby about 90 meters from the road. Breakfast is adequate with coffee, tea, water, juices, warm milk fresh milk. Bacon, sausages, eggs, fruits, bread, vegan dishes, stew, congee, rice, pastries, pho and more. My only complaining is the hotel remixed cafe sua da wasn't good. We Vietnamese should have condensed milk to mixed into the black coffee the way we like instead of asking for condensed milk every morning for breakfast. Is it easier to put a little jar of condensed milk for Vietnamese guests instead? That's the reason why I didn't give you the perfect score.

reviewerName: lok from Hong Kong SAR, China
title: “The staff is amazing!”
reviewText: The staff are super helpful, caring, and friendly. I got food poisoning from food in the central part of Phu Quoc. When I asked for help at this hotel, the staff tried their best to offer assistance and showed sincere care after I returned from the hospital. Thank you to all the staff for your care; it was very comforting for me when I got sick. ❤️❤️❤️ The pool is large, clean, and has an appreciated depth (1.2m). I enjoyed sunbathing and reading by the poolside; it was very relaxing and chill. The lifeguard staff is very helpful as well; without me asking, they came to help me set up the sun umbrellas, which was very thoughtful of them. 🥰 The location is very good, right next to the Grand World river. There are many convenience shops, restaurants, and spas within a one-minute walking distance. The street lights are bright, making it very safe even for solo female travelers like me. The hotel itself has a modern design. I like the balcony in every room. It is large, and you can open the balcony doors for fresh air. I also appreciate the sea view from the room. The room is spacious. Although some things inside the room are a bit old, they are still acceptable. The food is good. The pork porridge is amazing! All in all, it has a true resort vibe. 👍🏼 I will definitely stay again.

title: “It was really nice to play at the swimming pool.”
reviewText: It was convenient due to its proximity to Grand World. The breakfast was crowded with many people, but there was a good variety to eat moderately. The accommodation was clean, but it was a bit lacking in soundproofing. I recommend it for family travelers.

title: “The best hotels with accessibility to Grand World.”
reviewText: First of all, the accessibility to Grand World is excellent. The Grand World Clock Tower is only a minute away, just across the back road. The swimming pool in the middle of the hotel is well-maintained, and the condition of the rooms is also good. Additionally, a QR code is provided for free access to the Vinbus, making it very convenient to visit Vinpearl Safari or the water park. It is the best value hotel.

title: “Great Experience”
reviewText: We enjoyed our stay here. Managed to get a good deal for 2 nights which includes ticket to Vonwonder and Vin Pearl Safari. The staff were super friendly and the check in was smooth. Room condition was great. Facilties was good too and the breakfast choices were great. Great ambience and walking distance to the night market. Tks for the wonderful hospitality.

title: Mawya
reviewText: Enjoyed 3 nights stay in Cairo, very clean facilities, helpful staff and central location.

title: Maati
reviewText: Nice good staff from reception and in whole hotel. The hotel need renovation very old and also breakfast very poor for 35$ for person and for a 5 stars really need to do better. Also the amenities in the room should be better

title: Shereif
reviewText: The stay was very good but the price is very high compared to other hotels on the Nile. Parking is not offered free of charge to hotel residents.

title: Tianzhou
reviewText: The cleanest five-star hotel in Egypt, with comfortable service. Different from other hotels.

title: Sujeewa
reviewText: Lovely stay at Four seasons Nile plaza Cairo. Very nice place.

title: Юлия
reviewText: It was very nice experience, good food, good vibe, clean room and professional staff

title: Mohamed
reviewText: Near ti every thing Perfect view to nile Helpful staff

title: Mohamed
reviewText: Fourseasons

title: Ahmed
reviewText: Exlent Staff

title: Tahani
reviewText: excellent

title: Ahmad
reviewText: very nice place

title: Greg
reviewText: Four Seasons quality, accomodations, staff and food were excellent, we would recommend and definitely stay again if we are in Cairo.

title: Ali
reviewText: we had two reservation @ the same time,still i payed a lot more then my friend and i had a smaler room with a city view when he had been auto upgrad for a bigger room with the nile view!!!!!

title: Ghassan
reviewText: Nice hotel

title: Adnan
reviewText: Four seasons always promise the best comfort for the guests and it delivers. My wife and I stayed here for three nights, and everyday i was amused by the view of Nile from our balcony. I can never get tired of it. and I would love to go back again.

title: David
reviewText: Fantastic service seems to be the common theme for Four Seasons Properties in Egypt, and the Nile Plaza was no different. We were blessed with fantastic service, great food, and stunning views of the Nile. This is THE place to stay when in Cairo.

title: salem
reviewText: it was ok. it is not impressive. the lobby is small for such a big name

title: wang
reviewText: 超好玩的 大家ㄧ定要來參加 非常有趣的體驗 在 So good !!! I love it !!! 超好玩的 大家ㄧ定要來參加 非常有趣的體驗 So good !!! I love it !!!

title: Hana
reviewText: من انظف الفنادق وأفضل معامله من جميع العاملين وشكرا للموظفة الاستقبال جنه على حسن تعاملها ولطافتها

title: Meshoo
reviewText: ممتاز جدا وأنصح الجميع فيه والحلو فيه ان في أمن بالخارج لحمايه المكان
